name: IdsEdwAhySubDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT AHY_SUB.SUB_SK AS SUB_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, AHY_SUB.SUB_UNIQ_KEY AS SUB_UNIQ_KEY, AHY_SUB.AHY_CLNT_SUB_ID AS AHY_CLNT_SUB_ID, AHY_SUB.SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, AHY_SUB.SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_SK AS SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.AHY_SUB AHY_SUB LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON AHY_SUB.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT SUB_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AHY_CLNT_SUB_ID, SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte
